steps.title: Expand both sides
steps.content:
Apply the distributive property:
$$17(x-16) = 17x - 272$$
$$-16(x+17) = -16x - 272$$
So the equation becomes:
$$17x - 272 = -16x - 272$$

steps.title: Collect x terms and simplify
steps.content:
Notice the constant term $-272$ appears on both sides. Add $16x$ to both sides and add \$272$ to both sides:
$$17x + 16x = -272 + 272$$
$$33x = 0$$

steps.title: Solve and identify the number of solutions
steps.content: Divide both sides by 33: $$x = 0$$ Since we obtained a single value for $x$, the equation has exactly one solution. That matches choice A — A is correct.
